name: bark-agent-hook-codex
description: Send Bark notifications from Codex lifecycle hooks through bark-agent-hook.

interface.shortDescription: Send Bark notifications from Codex hooks
interface.longDescription: Agent Bark Notify wires Codex lifecycle hooks to bark-agent-hook so completion and approval-needed events can send Bark notifications.
defaultPrompt: Help me enable Bark notifications for Codex hooks
